full_text:
Puyang Xing (Ziyuan) 濮陽興 (子元)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Puyang Xing (濮陽興), styledZiyuan (子元), was born in Chenliu. Supported Sun Hao after Sun Xiu died, helping to elevate him to Emperor. Puyang Xing was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Puyang Xing lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
